input_used.prompt: Advertising campaign image in the exact graphic style of the East London Liquor Co. style references: off-white paper background, huge bold black condensed typography filling the frame reading 'FOR LIPS NOT THE SHELF', with the Phatstix tube lying diagonally across the type partially covering the letters, hand-sprayed black graffiti accent marks, a small hand-drawn smiley face icon in a fluorescent yellow circle, irreverent East London craft attitude. Studio flat-lay photography, photorealistic product, crisp print-quality type. The product (shown in the packshot reference) is Phatstix: an oversized natural lip balm twist-up tube, matte fluorescent yellow-green Pantone 923 C plastic body (high-vis-vest colour, approx #C5D135 - not olive, not lime-gold), a lowercase black 'phatstix' wordmark running vertically down the body as the ONLY marking, a transparent acrylic lid, a glossy same-colour threaded collar and base, and a pale natural cream balm dome. About 7cm tall and 3cm wide - bigger than a normal lip balm, smaller than a deodorant stick. Reproduce this product EXACTLY as in the packshot reference: same proportions, same colour, same wordmark spelling and placement, same materials. Never add decoration, patterns, extra text or logos to the tube.

The product (shown in the packshot reference) is Phatstix: an oversized natural lip balm twist-up tube, matte fluorescent yellow-green Pantone 923 C plastic body (high-vis-vest colour, approx #C5D135 - not olive, not lime-gold), a lowercase black 'phatstix' wordmark running vertically down the body as the ONLY marking, a transparent acrylic lid, a glossy same-colour threaded collar and base, and a pale natural cream balm dome. About 7cm tall and 3cm wide - bigger than a normal lip balm, smaller than a deodorant stick. Reproduce this product EXACTLY as in the packshot reference: same proportions, same colour, same wordmark spelling and placement, same materials. Never add decoration, patterns, extra text or logos to the tube. (Style note: emulate East London Liquor Co. campaign art direction from description alone.)
